creator.description: Recommend AI Shifu to friends who may need it.
creator.emptyQueue: Share your invite link. Once a friend completes mobile registration, you will immediately receive 1 month of plan benefits.
creator.inviteCardDescription: Copy your invite link and share it with a new user who has not registered for AI Shifu. After your friend clicks the link and completes registration, you will receive the corresponding plan reward.

rules.cap: Invite rewards are issued automatically and can accumulate up to {cap} months. For example, inviting 12 friends can earn 12 months of the basic plan.
rules.defer: If you currently have an active plan, invite rewards will automatically start after your current plan ends.
rules.firstRegistration: When a friend completes their first registration through your invite link, the invite counts as successful.
rules.inviteeBenefit: After registration, invited friends receive the new-user 1000-credit trial plan, valid for 15 days.
rules.inviterReward: For each friend who registers successfully, you receive {cycles} month of the basic plan ({credits} credits included, valued at RMB 199).
rules.unregistered: Share your invite link with new users who have not registered for AI Shifu before.

creator.shareMessage: I am using AI Shifu to turn knowledge and experience into one-on-one interactive courses. I recommend trying AI Shifu too. Register to get a free 15-day trial plan: {url}
creator.title: Invite Friends

tooltips.rewarded: Months already counted in automatic rewards.
